experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Corporate-grade experience, now at the service of your projects.

freelance.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Design, build and ship end-to-end web platforms for startups and businesses, owning each project from first call to production.
Work across the full stack with React, Next.js, Node.js, Python and TypeScript, building everything from custom e-commerce and SaaS products to corporate sites.
Develop backends with Node.js/Express, NestJS and Python (Django, Django REST), modeling data in PostgreSQL and MySQL with Prisma, TypeORM and Sequelize.
Design and document REST APIs, reusable component libraries and design systems with SCSS and Tailwind CSS to keep delivery fast and consistent.
Integrate payments and third-party services: Mercado Pago and Stripe (subscriptions, webhooks), Google OAuth, cloud storage (AWS S3 / GCS) and transactional email.
Build AI-powered features with the OpenAI API (assistants, generative content, smart automation) and architect multi-tenant, role-based platforms with secure auth (JWT, OAuth, Keycloak).
Provision and administer Linux (Ubuntu/Debian) VPS servers: Nginx reverse proxy, SSL with Let's Encrypt, PM2/Gunicorn, firewall (UFW) and SSH hardening.
Set up Docker deployments and CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions) with automated tests, zero-downtime releases, and ongoing maintenance, performance tuning and SEO.
Lead technical planning, database modeling and architecture decisions directly with clients, translating business goals into scalable systems.

morseVerse.title: Co-Founder & Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Co-founded the company and led technical direction, taking products from idea to launch.
Built scalable applications with Python, Next.js, React and TypeScript, keeping the codebase clean, typed and maintainable.
Designed the overall architecture and project structure, defining conventions, folder layout and reusable modules for long-term scalability.
Developed and integrated databases and APIs, optimizing frontend-backend communication and query performance.
Deployed and maintained services on Linux servers, configuring environments, domains, SSL and automated deployments.
Drove product and UX decisions alongside the team, balancing technical trade-offs with user needs.
Implemented authentication, role-based access and secure data handling across the platform.
Set up version control workflows (Git/GitHub), code reviews and collaborative practices for the dev team.

intelligentApps.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Built full-stack applications with React, Next.js, Node.js and PostgreSQL in a fast-paced product team.
Developed REST and GraphQL APIs with Prisma ORM, strong validation layers and clear error handling.
Integrated AI features using the OpenAI API — generative descriptions, smart filters and content automation.
Contributed to scalable, microservice-oriented architectures and shared internal libraries.
Implemented automated testing (unit and integration) to raise reliability and prevent regressions.
Deployed applications with Docker and CI/CD pipelines on Linux servers (Vercel and VPS).
Applied TypeScript and Tailwind CSS across the stack for consistency, type safety and developer productivity.
Collaborated in agile workflows with code reviews, Git branching strategies and continuous delivery.

digitalInnovators.title: Front End Developer
responsibilities: Built and maintained single-page applications with React and Redux for production clients.
Increased user retention by 15% and improved conversion rates by 20% through UX and performance work.
Contributed to an internal component library, reducing feature development time by 30%.
Developed custom React hooks and reusable patterns to improve code modularity and consistency.
Optimized rendering performance and bundle size, improving page load and responsiveness.
Worked closely with designers to translate Figma mockups into pixel-accurate, accessible interfaces.
Integrated REST APIs and managed application state for complex, data-heavy views.
